narrative:
Tate Township B (precinct in Clermont County) has 895 registered voters, with 61.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.8 percentage points.
